channel.title: The Next Generation on Trek Relaunch Book Club
channel.description: Recent content in The Next Generation on Trek Relaunch Book Club

item.title: (1) TNG: Death In Winter
item.description:
DNA thieves, Beverly Crusher’s maiden name and a few guest appearances from the USS Stargazer. Can author Michael Jan Friedman maneuver the Star Trek TNG books into this new era?

Spoilers ahead!
